theoremName: augmented closed-cone KLM-to-de Branges bridge theorem

canonicalHardyStatus.label: canonical Hardy/de Branges identity
canonicalHardyStatus.reason: The shifted-Xi de Branges kernel equals the signed Hardy branch Gram K_E=<h^+,h^+>-<h^-,h^->.  This bridge imports that identity through the finite augmented pullback theorem by default.

finiteThetaAugmentedPullbackStatus.label: finite theta augmented pullbacks
finiteThetaAugmentedPullbackStatus.reason: The split finite augmented pullback theorem proves that, for each finite theta truncation, K_{E,N}=T_N^*KLM_NT_N+R_{aug,N}^*D_{aug,N}R_{aug,N}; equivalently the signed Hardy Gram is exactly K_{E,N}.

continuumAugmentedRepairStatus.label: continuum augmented trace repair
continuumAugmentedRepairStatus.reason: The split trace-convergence and repair-positivity theorems prove R_aug,N converges to the closed trace R_aug, D_aug is bounded and nonnegative in the transported trace norm, and K+R_aug^*D_aug R_aug is a closed positive form.

uniformThetaTailStatus.label: uniform compact theta-tail convergence
uniformThetaTailStatus.reason: Imported from the split trace-convergence theorem: super-exponential theta-tail estimates give uniform compact convergence Xi_N->Xi and K_{E,N}->K_E on finite evaluation sets.

closedPositiveConeStatus.label: closed positive-cone limit
closedPositiveConeStatus.reason: Imported from the split closed-cone limit theorem: finite positive semidefinite Gram cones are closed under entrywise limits, so K_E lies in the closed positive cone.

klmToDeBrangesBridgeStatus.label: KLM-to-de Branges closed-cone bridge
klmToDeBrangesBridgeStatus.reason: The finite augmented KLM pullbacks converge entrywise to the shifted-Xi de Branges kernel.  Since each finite pullback is in the KLM positive cone and the cone is closed on finite Gram matrices, K_E is positive on every finite evaluation set.

formalProof: For finite theta truncation N, define Xi_N from modes n<=N and E_{omega,N}(z)=Xi_N(z+i omega).
The finite augmented pullback theorem writes K_{E,N}=T_N^*KLM_NT_N+R_{aug,N}^*D_{aug,N}R_{aug,N}.

The split trace-convergence and repair-positivity theorems prove R_aug,N->R_aug, D_aug>=0 in the transported trace norm, and closure of the augmented positive form on the completed trace-fiber domain.
Uniform compact convergence Xi_N->Xi implies K_{E,N}(w,z)->K_E(w,z) entrywise for every finite evaluation set in the upper half-plane.
The finite positive semidefinite cone is closed; hence K_E is positive on every finite evaluation set.
nextProofTarget: Apply the de Branges/Hermite-Biehler conclusion for E_omega(z)=Xi(z+i omega) and record the RH-side endpoint passage.
